(3) The stem-to-flower junction pixel is ambiguous — shares color with both leaf and petal regions, suggesting a possible color-bleed artifact at that corner pixel. No melting, no AA fringing, no semantic failure. The issues are minor but real under adversarial scrutiny; the sprite would likely pass casual review but fails strict 1px-consistent-outline and perfect-symmetry checks.
